title: JavaScript Arrays Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of creating, manipulating, and iterating over JavaScript arrays.

questions.question: Which of the following is correct syntax for creating a JavaScript array as a literal?
What is the key difference between push() and unshift()?
options: push() adds an element to the end, while unshift() adds it to the beginning.
unshift() removes an element from the array.
push() adds an element at its specified index.

questions.question: Which method returns a NEW array with elements that pass a test?
How do you access the last element in an array named 'items'?
What does map() return?
options: A new array with different values based on a function.
The first element that passes a test.
